academic.title: Academic Scholarship
academic.intro: The academic scholarship is one of the most important merit-based financial grants, awarded to students who have achieved outstanding academic results in their previous active semester.
academic.empty_description: The academic scholarship sections will be available soon.

social.title: Regular Grant Based on Social Needs
social.empty_description: The social scholarship content will be available soon.

regular.title: Regular Grant Based on Social Needs
regular.list_title: A student may apply for the Regular Social Scholarship if they,
list_items: are enrolled in a full-time bachelor’s, master’s, single-cycle, or doctoral program, and

are studying in a state-funded or state scholarship-funded form of education, or began their studies in such a form and, based on the number of semesters started in the given program, would still be eligible to participate in a state-funded program.
regular.description_1: Regardless of the number of programs they are enrolled in, each applicant may submit only one application for this scholarship. The application must be submitted through the
regular.description_2: (Unified Application and Evaluation System of the Budapest University of Technology and Economics) platform during the application period.

exceptional.title: Exceptional Grant Based on Social Needs
exceptional.description_1: Students who have become socially disadvantaged due to an unexpected event, or whose social situation has unexpectedly deteriorated, are eligible to apply for the Exceptional Social Scholarship.
exceptional.description_2: The scholarship is a one-time grant. Students may submit multiple applications within a semester if several events justify it, but only one application may be submitted per event. The application must be submitted through the
exceptional.description_3: (Unified Application and Evaluation System of the Budapest University of Technology and Economics) platform.
exceptional.description_4: Before submitting the application, it is recommended to consult with the current president of the University Social Committee regarding the required documents.

social.more_info: For more information, please visit the website of the University Social Committee (ESZB):

ehk.title: EHK scholarships
ehk.empty_description: The EHK scholarships content will be available soon.

payouts.title: Payout Information
payouts.subtitle: The scholarship payout dates for the {title} academic year
payouts.intro_text: The scholarship payout dates for the {title} academic year are as follows:
payouts.important_todo_p1: To ensure successful scholarship payout, you must register your bank account number in Neptun in time; otherwise, the transfer cannot be completed.
payouts.important_todo_p2: Steps to register your bank account: Neptun → Finances → Settings → Bank accounts → Add bank account number.
payouts.important_todo_p3: Additionally, a permanent address registered in Neptun is required for the payout.
payouts.important_todo_p4: If you do not register the necessary data by the third payout attempt, the University is not obliged to initiate another transfer until you notify them that you have corrected the deficiencies.
payouts.wrong_transfer_title: To-Dos in Case of Incorrect Transfer or Termination of Student Status
payouts.wrong_transfer_p1: In the event of an incorrect transfer, you must repay the incorrectly paid amount to the University within 15 days. The same applies upon termination of student status, change of work schedule, or termination of scholarship eligibility; any necessary repayment must be settled within 15 days following the change.
payouts.check_mueper: The specific payout date for the applied scholarship is always contained in the call for applications available on the MŰEPER interface.
payouts.no_active_period: No active payout period at the moment.
